name: Yahni Me Koukia (Meat Stew with Broad Beans)
recipeIngredient: 1 kg Beef or lamb stew meat
recipeInstructions:
Serves: 5-6 Cooking time: 2 to 2-1/2 hours
1. Trim the meat and cut into 3 cm (1-1/4 inch) cubes.
2. Heat half the oil or butter in a heavy pan and brown the meat quickly on each side, adding a single layer of meat at a time. Remove to a plate when browned.
3. Reduce heat, add remaining oil and onion, and fry gently until transparent.
4. Add garlic, celery, and carrot, and fry for a few minutes longer.
5. Stir in tomato paste, wine, water, cloves, bay leaf, and most of the parsley. Return meat to the pan and add salt and pepper to taste and sugar.
6. Cover and simmer gently for 45 minutes for lamb or 1-1/4 hours for beef.
7. Wash broad beans well, top and tail, pulling off strings at the same time. Cut into 8 cm (3-inch) lengths.
8. Add to yahni, cover pan, and simmer for further 30-45 minutes or until meat is tender.
9. Transfer yahni to a serving dish and sprinkle with remaining parsley. Serve hot with a tossed salad and crusty bread.
Note: Other vegetables may replace the broad beans; use the same quantity unless otherwise specified.
